name: Mega Menu Feature
description: One lightweight graphical card sourced from a category, product, B2C Content Asset, Salesforce CMS record or custom editorial content.

attribute_definition_groups.name: Mega Menu Feature
attribute_definition_groups.description: One lightweight graphical card sourced from a category, product, B2C Content Asset, Salesforce CMS record or custom editorial content.

attribute_definitions.name: Content source
attribute_definitions.description: Choose the system that supplies the card defaults. Manual overrides below always win.

attribute_definitions.name: Source category
attribute_definitions.description: Used when Content source is Category. Name, description, main image and destination are inherited.

attribute_definitions.name: Source product
attribute_definitions.description: Used when Content source is Product. Product imagery, name, destination and optional price are inherited.

attribute_definitions.name: B2C Content Asset ID
attribute_definitions.description: Exact online Content Asset ID used when Content source is B2C Content.

attribute_definitions.name: Salesforce CMS record
attribute_definitions.description: Used for Salesforce CMS or as a starting point for Custom content. Configure field mappings when the record uses non-standard attribute IDs.

attribute_definitions.name: Product image type
attribute_definitions.description: Preferred catalog image view type for Product sources. If unavailable, the card falls back to another supported configured type.

attribute_definitions.name: Eyebrow override
attribute_definitions.description: Optional short context label above the title.

attribute_definitions.name: Title override
attribute_definitions.description: Overrides the source title. Required for a purely Custom card.

attribute_definitions.name: Copy override
attribute_definitions.description: Overrides the source description or excerpt.

attribute_definitions.name: Image override
attribute_definitions.description: Page Designer image used ahead of any catalog, Content or CMS image. Its focal point is preserved.

attribute_definitions.name: Image alternative text
attribute_definitions.description: Overrides inherited alternative text when the image conveys information.

attribute_definitions.name: Decorative image
attribute_definitions.description: Uses empty alternative text for a purely decorative image. The linked card keeps its visible text as the accessible name.

attribute_definitions.name: Badge
attribute_definitions.description: Optional short campaign marker such as New, Sale or Exclusive.

attribute_definitions.name: CTA label
attribute_definitions.description: Visible call-to-action text. A localized default is used when the card has a destination.

attribute_definitions.name: Destination override
attribute_definitions.description: Safe relative or HTTP(S) URL used ahead of the source destination.

attribute_definitions.name: Open in new window
attribute_definitions.description: Intended for external campaign destinations. The link receives safe rel attributes.

attribute_definitions.name: Show product price
attribute_definitions.description: Shows the storefront price when the source is Product.

attribute_definitions.name: Card layout
attribute_definitions.description: Field: layout

attribute_definitions.name: Image ratio
attribute_definitions.description: Field: imageRatio

attribute_definitions.name: Image fit
attribute_definitions.description: Field: objectFit

attribute_definitions.name: Color tone
attribute_definitions.description: Semantic storefront tokens only; compatible with theme changes and dark mode.

attribute_definitions.name: CMS/Content title attribute
attribute_definitions.description: Field: titleAttribute

attribute_definitions.name: CMS/Content copy attribute
attribute_definitions.description: Field: excerptAttribute

attribute_definitions.name: CMS/Content image attribute
attribute_definitions.description: Field: imageAttribute

attribute_definitions.name: CMS/Content image alt attribute
attribute_definitions.description: Field: imageAltAttribute

attribute_definitions.name: CMS/Content link attribute
attribute_definitions.description: Field: linkAttribute

attribute_definitions.name: CMS eyebrow attribute
attribute_definitions.description: Field: eyebrowAttribute
